context: This project has just been migrated to the Astro 5 Content Layer API. The `src/content/config.ts` now uses `glob` loaders that point to brand-specific subdirectories (e.g., `src/content/zelia-vance/products/`). Your task is to physically move the existing content files into that new directory structure so the loaders can find them. Do NOT modify any Astro component files or the config.ts. Only move/create files as described below.

tasks.title: Create Brand Directory Structure
tasks.instruction: Create the following empty directories if they do not already exist: `src/content/zelia-vance/products/`, `src/content/zelia-vance/lookbooks/`, `src/content/zelia-vance/settings/`, `src/content/zelia-vance/newsletter/`, `src/content/zelia-vance/blog/`.

tasks.title: Migrate Product Files
tasks.instruction: Move all `.md` files from `src/content/products/` into `src/content/zelia-vance/products/`. After moving, delete the now-empty `src/content/products/` directory.

tasks.title: Migrate Lookbook Files
tasks.instruction: Move all `.md` files from `src/content/lookbooks/` into `src/content/zelia-vance/lookbooks/`. After moving, delete the now-empty `src/content/lookbooks/` directory.

tasks.title: Migrate Settings Files
tasks.instruction: Move all files (`.yml`, `.yaml`, `.json`) from `src/content/settings/` into `src/content/zelia-vance/settings/`. After moving, delete the now-empty `src/content/settings/` directory.

tasks.title: Migrate Newsletter Files
tasks.instruction: Check if `src/content/newsletter/` exists. If it does, move all files into `src/content/zelia-vance/newsletter/` and delete the old directory.

tasks.title: Keep Legal Pages Shared
tasks.instruction: Do NOT move `src/content/pages/`. Legal pages (returns.md, terms-of-service.md, privacy-policy.md, shipping.md) are intentionally SHARED across all brands and must remain at `src/content/pages/`. This is by design.

tasks.title: Verify Build
tasks.instruction: After all file moves, run `npm run build` (or `npm run check` if build is not available). The build MUST succeed with no errors. The only acceptable warnings are pre-existing ones about the `image-engine/test` TypeScript module. If there are errors about missing content, double-check that all files were moved to the correct destinations.
